concerns.text: FR-002 mandates specific model choices (gpt2, distilgpt2, pythia-70m) and CPU-only mode. The idea specifies the research question about transactive-memory dynamics, not implementation details. Model selection and hardware constraints belong in the plan, not the spec.

SC-003 specifies a concrete empirical threshold (≤0.07 / 7% variation). Per the spec template, planning docs should defer specific empirical values to the implementation phase. This should be a [deferred] marker with the metric and reference defined.

SC-005 specifies R² ≥ 0.85 as a success criterion. This is an empirical threshold that should be deferred per the spec template convention. The metric (power-law fit quality) and reference (scaling plot) are defined, but the threshold value should not be asserted in the spec.

FR-003 mandates a JSON key-value store for shared memory. The idea specifies 'shared memory buffer' without implementation details. The data structure choice is implementation detail that belongs in the plan.

FR-004 specifies Shannon entropy as the exact formula for specialization index. The idea mentions 'specialization index' without prescribing the exact metric. This is methodological detail that should be validated in the plan stage.
